questions.context_sentence: There is paint on Kate's clothes.
questions.cn: 凯特的衣服上有油漆。
questions.hint: pain(痛苦)里加一个t，粉刷(paint)油漆很累很痛苦。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There is ____ on Kate's clothes. (提示: 油漆)

questions.context_sentence: She has painted her bedroom.
questions.cn: 她已经粉刷了她的卧室。
questions.hint: bed(床) + room(房间) -> 放床的房间就是卧室。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Joe has been eating too much recently.
questions.cn: 乔最近吃得太多了。
questions.hint: recent(最近的) + ly(副词后缀) -> 最近。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I've been repairing my bike.
questions.cn: 我一直在修理我的自行车。
questions.hint: re(重新) + pair(一双) -> 重新配对，使恢复正常，即修理。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I've been ____ my bike. (提示: 修理)

questions.context_sentence: My hands are very dirty.
questions.cn: 我的手很脏。
questions.hint: dirt(泥土) + y(形容词后缀) -> 泥土多的，即脏的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Somebody has eaten all the chocolates.
questions.cn: 有人把所有的巧克力都吃光了。
questions.hint: choc(巧) + o + late(克立) -> 巧克力的拼写。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I'm learning Arabic, but I haven't been learning it very long.
questions.cn: 我正在学习阿拉伯语，但我学的时间还不长。
questions.hint: Arab(阿拉伯人) + ic(形容词/名词后缀) -> 阿拉伯语。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I'm learning ____, but I haven't been learning it very long. (提示: 阿拉伯语)

questions.context_sentence: I've been meaning to phone Anna, but I keep forgetting.
questions.cn: 我一直打算给安娜打电话，但我老是忘记。
questions.hint: 这个词有“意思是”的意思，口语里 I've been meaning to 表示我一直打算去做。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She is travelling round Europe.
questions.cn: 她正在环游欧洲。
questions.hint: tra(他) + vel(围栏) -> 他走出围栏去旅行。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: This year he won the national championship again.
questions.cn: 今年他又赢得了全国锦标赛。
questions.hint: champion(冠军) + ship(名词后缀) -> 锦标赛/冠军地位。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: This year he won the national ____ again. (提示: 锦标赛)

questions.context_sentence: When they left college, Lisa and Sue started making films together.
questions.cn: 当她们大学毕业时，丽莎和苏开始一起制作电影。
questions.hint: col + lege(里脊) -> 在大学(college)里吃里脊。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: How many people have you invited?
questions.cn: 你邀请了多少人？
questions.hint: in(进入) + vite(招待) -> 请人进来招待，即邀请。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Have you ever worked in a factory?
questions.cn: 你曾在工厂工作过吗？
questions.hint: fact(制造) + ory(场所) -> 制造东西的场所，即工厂。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Have you ever worked in a ____? (提示: 工厂)

questions.context_sentence: He has appeared in several films.
questions.cn: 他在好几部电影中出演过。
questions.hint: ap + pear(梨) -> 树上突然出现了一个梨。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I keep forgetting.
questions.cn: 我老是忘记。
questions.hint: for(为了) + get(得到) -> 为了得到新的，必须忘记(forget)旧的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
